notes: After-hours brief: S&P/Nasdaq closed lower on big-tech weakness, Dow held with back-to-back gains; VIX 17.3, oil under $74. ASML added to avoids on the China tech-restriction headline. Holding defensive at 0.50 into a heavy June 22-26 data week.
journal_entry: End-of-day Monday check, +$2.9k day. Tape stays split — Dow firm, Nasdaq soft on tech rotation. Added ASML to avoids on U.S./China tech-concern report; kept parabolic AMC/BFLY, spec CLOV, extended AAPL, soft AMD/ROKU/SABR/TTWO/SLDB. Chip leaders MU/MRVL/SNDK/NBIS still favored. Watching rate expectations and the rest of the data slate before re-risking; oversized winners ride, no chasing.
